---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# araponga: estimating 3D angles from 2D landmarks in R

<!-- badges: start -->
<!-- badges: end -->

`araponga` allows users to estimate the 3D orientations (yaw and pitch) of an object knowing the 2D coordinates of two landmarks and the (approximate) elevation angle of camera/observer relative to the object.

## Installation

You can install the development version of araponga from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("jocateme/araponga")
```
